---
title: "shadow_forge.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\wardens\shadow_forge.py"
loc: 149
complexity: 11
logic_score: 5.50
style_score: 3.72
intel_score: 4.62
overall_score: 2.83
---

## Intent
The `shadow_forge.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on ShadowForgeWarden, __init__, _get_docker_executable, scan, execute_cycle, _promote_from_container. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via ShadowForgeWarden, __init__, _get_docker_executable, scan, execute_cycle, _promote_from_container. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 25 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.base](file://src.sentinel.wardens.base)

### Exports
- `ShadowForgeWarden`
- `__init__`
- `_get_docker_executable`
- `scan`
- `execute_cycle`
- `_promote_from_container`
